name: 700 Credit Repair
description_short: National credit repair company that disputes inaccurate and unverifiable items on credit reports. Offers personal credit repair, home ownership programs, and business credit services with lifetime guarantees.
description_long:
700 Credit Repair is a national credit restoration company that has been operating with over 60 years of combined team experience. The company positions itself as a full-service credit repair provider working with clients and creditors to challenge questionable, inaccurate, outdated, misleading, and unverifiable data on consumer credit reports. They serve consumers seeking to improve their credit profiles across the United States.

700 Credit Repair offers three primary service tiers: a Core Credit Repair program at $150/month that includes dispute letter services and credit tracking, a Home Ownership Program featuring unlimited dispute letters and legal audits with free credit evaluation, and a Business Credit & Funding service. All new clients receive a free credit consultation. The company provides additional resources including a credit tracker app for client communication, a client results tracking portal, unlimited legal audits, coaching services, and access to a VIP membership site.

The company differentiates itself through several claimed competitive advantages: a lifetime guarantee against deleted items returning, state licensing in Texas, staff that includes certified credit experts, FICO experts, paralegals, and a consumer credit expert witness. They advertise a "Top 10 Credit Repair Company" designation and claim to have helped over 20,000 families. The platform includes an affiliate tracking portal for partner programs and multiple service tiers designed for different customer needs including business credit expansion.

Client testimonials on the website highlight success stories including home purchases and auto loan approvals following their services, with one client reporting credit score improvements within 4 months. However, as with all credit repair services, results depend on the validity of disputes filed, the responsiveness of credit bureaus and creditors, and the specific negative items on individual reports. The $150/month cost represents an ongoing expense, and the company's lifetime guarantee applies specifically to deleted items returning, not to initial dispute success rates.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: State licensed and bonded in Texas with transparent regulatory compliance
Lifetime guarantee against deleted items returning to credit reports
Free initial credit consultation with no obligation
Multiple service tiers including business credit and home ownership programs
Staff includes certified credit experts, FICO experts, and paralegals
Credit tracker app included for real-time client communication and updates
Nationwide service coverage across all U.S. states
cons: Ongoing monthly fee of $150 may accumulate significantly over time if disputes take many months
Lifetime guarantee applies only to deleted items re-appearing, not to initial dispute success rates
No pricing transparency for business credit and home ownership programs on public website
Testimonials are company-selected and may not represent typical customer outcomes
Credit repair results depend entirely on validity of disputes and bureau responsiveness, which are outside company control
best_for: Consumers with inaccurate or unverifiable items on their credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Prospective homebuyers needing credit improvement to qualify for mortgage loans
Individuals willing to pay ongoing fees for managed credit repair services and personal coaching
diagnosis: 700 Credit Repair is best for consumers with verifiable errors or unverifiable negative items on their credit reports who want professional guidance and ongoing dispute services to improve credit scores. The main caveat is that credit repair success depends on whether items are actually inaccurate or unverifiable—the company cannot remove accurate negative information, and results timelines vary by case complexity and bureau responsiveness.
services: Personal credit repair and dispute letter services ($150/month)
Free credit consultation and initial evaluation
Home ownership program with unlimited dispute letters
Unlimited legal audits of credit reports
Credit tracker mobile app for client updates
Client results tracking portal for dispute monitoring
Credit coaching and VIP membership site access
Expert witness services in consumer credit matters
Affiliate tracking portal for partner programs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
